{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Ninecloud servants
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ninecloud servants]] wear multi-colored robes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] ordered lunch from a [[Ninecloud]] servant.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
